intro: A wall of ancient, perfectly clear ice rises before you. Something huge is frozen solid inside it - a shape that has not moved in ages.
title: Frozen in Time
description: The ice has kept its prisoner flawless: an ancient Pokemon, and clutched against it, an item still bright after all these years. {{thawTell}} You could thaw it free to wake and catch it, or carefully chip out the preserved item it holds and leave the rest to its long sleep.

1.label: Thaw it free
1.tooltip: (+) Wake the ancient Pokemon and catch it. A gentle thaw wakes it calm; a careless one wakes it hostile (fight first).
1.selected: You work to melt the ice around the frozen shape.

2.label: Chip out the item
2.tooltip: (+) Carefully free the perfectly preserved held item. No fight.
2.selected: You chip patiently at the ice and work the preserved item loose.

thawGentle: Your Fire-blood melts the ice gently. The ancient Pokemon stirs, blinks, and wakes drowsy and unafraid.
thawHard: With no flame to ease the thaw, you crack the ice the hard way. The ancient Pokemon wakes with a furious roar!
